title: monardella odoratissima subsp. australis
intro: Monardella odoratissima subsp. australis, also known as southern mountain monardella, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its essential oil content. The health benefits of Monardella odoratissima subsp. australis include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a useful remedy for colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to promote overall wellness and treat various health conditions.
